_comment: Mutation testing config. Manual-trigger only (workflow_dispatch). See .github/workflows/mutation.yml for the rationale: bun's test runner has no programmatic API (oven-sh/bun#26191), so stryker-js falls back to spawning the full CLI per mutant — too slow for every push. Scope limited to pure-function modules with strong unit tests so a manual run completes in single-digit minutes.

commandRunner.command: bun test --isolate tests/wbi-pure.test.ts tests/wbi-diagnostics.test.ts tests/wbi-sentinel.test.ts tests/auto-blend.test.ts tests/fetch-cache.test.ts tests/user-blacklist-parsers.test.ts tests/remote-keywords-sanitize.test.ts
